worktree_state.content:
# EditorConfig is awesome: https://EditorConfig.org
root = true

# All files
[*]
indent_style = space
indent_size = 2
end_of_line = lf
charset = utf-8
trim_trailing_whitespace = true
insert_final_newline = true

# Markdown files - preserve trailing whitespace for line breaks
[*.md]
trim_trailing_whitespace = false

# JSON files
[*.json]
indent_size = 2

# YAML files
[*.{yml,yaml}]
indent_size = 2

# Prisma schema files
[*.prisma]
indent_size = 2

# EJS templates
[*.ejs]
indent_size = 2

# Makefile requires tabs
[Makefile]
indent_style = tab
